title: pelargonium obturbum
intro: Pelargonium obturbum, also known as Mountain Geranium or South African Pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium obturbum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium obturbum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
